PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Dec-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Rueb for and with John Kikuchi.

Mr. Rueb stated that they have retained Christina Gallagher Nelson to assist with this matter, that they have a substitution of attorney that they have agreed to, that it will be filed today and that Ms. Nelson is requesting a continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to November 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Reub is to inform Ms. Nelson that she needs to either file a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration no later than November 1, 2018. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Counsel appeared at the August 1, 2018 hearing, that he was told to get the required documents filed and nothing has been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Personal Representative to appear on September 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To Aug-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Motta specially appearing for Attorney Gregory Rueb on behalf of John Kikuchi.

Mr. Motta requested a continuance to allow dismissal of the probate matter stating that the civil action in Contra Costa County settled/was resolved several months ago in June, that it was dismissed last month and that the civil action is the main asset. Status on close of estate is continued to August 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file petition for final distribution, or some other petition to close out this estate, or if the matter is not ready for final distribution, he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration requesting additional time to administer the estate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Motta for John Kikuchi (Petitioner).

Mr. Motta stated that this is a wrongful death case involving Ms. Kikuchi's Husband and that the matter is set for a four month trial in Contra Costa County on October 20, 2017. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file a petition for approval of a status report. Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal; Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to June 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
